headline: Emerson Electric Taps AI Water Automation To Support Growth Narrative
summary: Emerson Electric (NYSE:EMR) is taking a central role in new digital and AI-driven solutions for water automation and smart city projects. The company is being highlighted as a key participant in the expanding Water Automation and Instrumentation market, where smart sensors, IoT devices, and AI analytics are reshaping water management. These efforts aim to improve sustainability and efficiency across municipal and industrial water systems as cities invest more in smart infrastructure. For...

headline: Chemical Concentration Monitor Industry Research and Global Market Forecast Report 2025-2030
summary: The global chemical concentration monitor market, valued at USD 6.90 billion in 2025, is forecast to reach USD 9.36 billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 6.3%.
